name: Radio Free Brooklyn Music Submission Form
manual_review_reason: Form requires free downloadable music links, artist/contact fields, NYC availability questions and anti-spam validation; do not automate CAPTCHA or validation fields.

name: Worldwide FM Collaboration and New Voices Pitch Route
country: United Kingdom / London / global online radio platform
manual_review_reason: Route is a general collaboration/contact form and business email; pitch relevance, rights, links and outreach copy need owner approval.

name: NTS Radio Show Proposal Audio-Link Route
country: United Kingdom / London and Manchester / global underground online radio
manual_review_reason: Show-proposal form accepts audio demo links but is not a direct music-submission queue; concept, rights and suitability need manual review.

name: WMSC 90.3 FM Music Director Review Route
manual_review_reason: Official Music Director routing exists, but protected contact links were not decoded and the pitch must be prepared manually.

name: WFUV 90.7 Music Department Physical Submission Route
manual_review_reason: WFUV asks to send music by snail mail to the Music Department; physical mailing, packaging and follow-up require owner approval.
